exampleSentencesTranslated: My parents do not allow me to go out late with friends.
The company will allow employees to work from home tomorrow.
Can you allow your friend to borrow your motorbike?
notes:
cho phép = to allow or give permission for something to happen.

It’s a verb, usually used when someone with authority agrees to something. Very common with rules, parents, bosses, schools, laws.  
You can also use it with things: cho phép + việc gì.

Close synonym: cho (shorter, more casual). Opposite: cấm (forbid).
notes_md:
**cho phép** = to allow or give permission for something to happen.

It’s a verb, usually used when someone with authority agrees to something. Very common with rules, parents, bosses, schools, laws.  
You can also use it with things: cho phép + việc gì.

Close synonym: **cho** (shorter, more casual). Opposite: **cấm** (forbid).
exampleSentences: Ba mẹ không cho phép em đi chơi khuya với bạn bè.
Công ty sẽ cho phép nhân viên làm việc từ xa vào ngày mai.
Anh có thể cho phép bạn mượn xe của anh không?

example.es: El maestro permite a los estudiantes salir a jugar.
example.vi: Giáo viên cho phép học sinh ra ngoài chơi.
example.en: The teacher allows the students to go outside to play.

definitions.vi: Cho phép ai đó làm điều gì đó.
definitions.en: To allow or permit someone to do something.
definitions.es: Permitir o autorizar a alguien a hacer algo.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi ___ sử dụng điện thoại.

translation.en: We are allowed to use the phone.
